zh.lifeSummary: Anne Venables是Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury和Catherine Ann De Grosvenor的女兒，於1453年出生在英國爾麗頓 白 內斯頓。她於1468年與Thomas Brooke在英國爾麗頓 白 內斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1491年享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anne Venables是Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury和Catherine Ann De Grosvenor的女儿，于1453年出生在英国爾麗頓 白 內斯頓。她于1468年与Thomas Brooke在英国爾麗頓 白 內斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1491年享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Anne Venables was born in 1453, in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England as the daughter of Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury and Catherine Ann De Grosvenor. She married Thomas Brooke in 1468, in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1491, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Anne Venables est née en 1453, à Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Angleterre, fille de Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury et Catherine Ann De Grosvenor. Elle a épousé Thomas Brooke en 1468, à Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1491, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Anne Venables wurde 1453 in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, als Tochter von Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury und Catherine Ann De Grosvenor geboren. Sie hat 1468 in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England Thomas Brooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1491 im Alter von 38 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Venablesは1453年にイギリスチェシュアイアレイトン ビー ネストンでSir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of MarburyとCatherine Ann De Grosvenorの娘として生まれた。1468年にイギリスチェシュアイアレイトン ビー ネストンでThomas Brookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1491年に38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Venables(은)는 1453년 영국 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴에서 Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury(와)과 Catherine Ann De Grosvenor의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1468년 영국 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴에서 Thomas Brooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1491년 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Anne Venables родилась в 1453 г. в местности лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury и Catherine Ann De Grosvenor. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Brooke в 1468 г. в местности лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1491 г. в возрасте 38 лет.
